issue.summary: Full Node repo tests stalled around an isolated product-practice lane because sync child-process execution is a bad primitive for nested subprocess tests.
issue.risk: CI could hang and fail to emit a complete node-tests-latest proof.

fix.summary: Mutation-sensitive tests remain one-file lanes, but all files now run through async detached process groups with explicit process-tree termination. Release publication also has an optional strict fail-closed gate.

evidence.strictReleaseCommand: npm run verify:publish-decision:release exits non-zero unless okForNpmNativePublication is true

remainingBlockers: Rust rebuild proof still requires cargo/rustc on a build host.
Docker/destructive sandbox lanes are still not proven in this environment.
local-quality source profile still cannot be treated as complete without Cargo availability.
